The exchange plans to formally withdraw its exit application soon. The state government has communicated its revival proposal to the central government. CSE faces significant regulatory and technological challenges ahead.

title: Rekha Jhunjhunwala sells 1 crore Canara Bank shares in Q1. What's behind the move?
summary: Veteran investor Rekha Jhunjhunwala sold over 1.07 crore Canara Bank shares during the April–June quarter, reducing her stake from 1.54% to 1.42%, according to the lender's latest shareholding data. The stake sale comes amid an 18% decline in the PSU bank's stock in 2026.

title: Rekha Jhunjhunwala likely exits this smallcap metal stock after 90% rally in 1 year. Do you own?
summary: Ace investor Rekha Jhunjhunwala has likely exited her investment in Raghav Productivity Enhancers after steadily reducing her stake over recent quarters. The smallcap metal stock has gained about 90% in the past year and more than doubled from its March low, according to the latest shareholding data.

title: Landmark Cars shares jump 17.5% to six-month high after record June-quarter sales
summary: Landmark Cars shares jumped 17.5% to  ₹496.70, hitting a six-month high after reporting record first-quarter sales of  ₹1,733 crore, a 22.47% year-on-year increase. The company anticipates sustained sales growth with new model launches expected soon.

title: Defence stocks to buy or sell: Kotak expects defence upcycle to continue, prefers HAL over peers
summary: India's defence sector is predicted to experience an 11% CAGR in capital expenditure through FY2030, driven by increases in domestic procurement and AoN approvals. Kotak Institutional Equities forecasts a strong push in defence exports, while maintaining cautious views on specific companies.

title: Higher oil prices to rising bond yields: 5 key risks that could keep the Indian stock market under pressure in 2026
summary: As geopolitical tensions and economic indicators cloud the path to recovery, the Indian stock market faces major headwinds. Investors should brace for short-term volatility amidst rising oil prices, bond yields, and inflation pressures that challenge market stability.

title: SBI Funds IPO to test investor appetite for  ₹4.81-trillion IPO pipeline
summary: The country's largest asset manager is entering the market at a relatively moderate valuation, and its subscription and listing performance could influence how dozens of companies price and time their public issues in the coming months.

title: World's best-performing market Kospi index enters bear market: Can South Korea's selloff hit Indian stock markets?
summary: The KOSPI's decline poses a sentiment risk for India, primarily due to FII selling amid global cautiousness. However, rising oil prices present a greater threat by increasing import costs and inflation. Indian markets expect volatility influenced by oil prices and AI earnings over the next months.

title: HCL Tech: Despite strong deal wins, risk-reward remains unfavourable
summary: So far in 2026, HCL shares are down 27%. It trades at FY28 PE multiple of 15 – a premium to larger peers TCS and Infosys, shows Bloomberg data. HCL’s narrowing growth differential, coupled with data-centre investment risk, makes the risk-reward unattractive, said a Nuvama Research report.

title: HCLTech follows TCS into data centres—with a different AI playbook
summary: HCLTech is betting on AI infrastructure, compute and applications to capture a bigger share of the AI value chain, but investors remain focused on slowing growth and AI-driven pricing pressure.

title: Temasek joins ADIA, SoftBank in trimming Lenskart stake with  ₹1,940 crore block deal
summary: Temasek sold a 2% stake in Lenskart worth about  ₹1,940 crore, cutting its holding to 4.75%, as institutional investors continue to monetize holdings ahead of a busy IPO pipeline.

title: UPI vs Credit Cards: Experts explain how to choose right payment method for everyday spending
summary: UPI and credit cards each offer unique advantages for everyday payments. Here are the key differences, benefits, rewards, credit score impact, and practical tips for choosing the right payment method for daily spending, budgeting and long-term financial planning in India.

title: EPS Scheme 2026: 5 key pension benefits for a family every EPF subscriber should know
summary: The Employees' Pension Scheme (EPS) offers financial security to an employee's family through widow pension, child pension, nominee pension and dependent parent pension.&nbsp;

title: Biocon among 4 midcap stocks that hit 52-week highs and rallied up to 21% in a month
summary: Despite the Sensex falling 561 points on Tuesday, four BSE 150 Midcap stocks—The Phoenix Mills, Ipca Laboratories, Laurus Labs and Biocon—scaled fresh 52-week highs, signalling strong buying interest and sustained bullish momentum amid broader market weakness.

title: Moody's affirms SBI, HDFC Bank ratings on strong asset quality
summary: Moody's Ratings has confirmed the ratings for both State Bank of India and HDFC Bank, attributing a stable outlook to their robust asset quality. SBI excels with its diverse lending practices and stable net interest margins, while HDFC Bank is bolstered by a strong retail presence that ensures a low-cost deposit base. The agency forecasts that asset quality for both banks will remain stable moving forward.

title: SBI Funds Management IPO: How SBI shareholders can improve chances of allotment
summary: The SBI Funds Management IPO was subscribed 52% on day one. Eligible SBI shareholders can apply under a reserved quota, competing only with fellow shareholders, potentially improving allotment chances. Investors may also apply separately in the retail category, while post-record-date SBI buyers remain ineligible.

title: Housing finance stocks: Is the worst of perception over? Time for a relook? 11 HFC stocks with upside potential from a low 6% to 30%
summary: As a sector, housing finance has borne the brunt of regulatory changes and various scams at different points of time. It is a sector that has produced both heroes (HDFC) and villains (DHFL). Given that housing demand will continue rising, it is a sector that is bound to grow. So, what matters is which stock you own; and how long you intend to hold it. The horizon is important as this sector has to deal with interest rate cycles as well as regulatory changes. This makes these stocks prone to phases of underperformance.

title: 12 stocks held by 100+ MFs in June surged up to 105% in just over 6 months
summary: Mutual funds' favourite stocks have rewarded investors handsomely in CY26. ETMarkets' analysis shows that 12 stocks held by over 100 mutual fund schemes each have surged between 50% and 105% so far this year, reflecting strong institutional conviction and robust market momentum.

title: Expert view: Risk-reward appears favourable from a medium-term perspective, says Equirus Asset Management's MD, CIO
summary: Ashutosh Tiwari, MD and CIO- Public Equities, Equirus Asset Management, highlights how large-cap stocks in India present a favourable risk-reward opportunity amid evolving geopolitical dynamics and changing commodity prices.&nbsp;

title: Top Gainers & Losers on 14 July: HCL Tech, Ceat, Swiggy, Anant Raj, Newgen Software Tech among top losers
summary: Investor sentiment in India dipped on July 14, driven by rising crude oil prices amid US-Iran tensions, leading to market losses over 0.7%. Nifty Realty and PSU Bank were among the biggest losers, while Nifty Pharma performed positively despite overall market weakness.

title: Byju's founder faces setback as Singapore court rejects his plea to halt a 6-month jail sentence
summary: The Singapore High Court denied Byju’s founder Byju Raveendran's request to halt a six-month jail sentence. Details here.

title: TCS secures tech contract for New York's JFK Airport's  ₹1.8 lakh crore terminal project
summary: TCS will develop and manage digital infrastructure for New Terminal One at JFK Airport, part of a $19-billion redevelopment project. Details here.

title: 2 crore ITRs already filed: Experts explain why you must submit your tax returns before 31 July deadline
summary: With two crore income tax returns already filed, experts advise taxpayers to complete their ITR filing before the 31 July deadline. Early submission can help avoid last-minute errors, resolve tax mismatches, claim refunds faster and ensure smooth compliance without depending on an extension.

title: Why diversification—not stock picking—could define wealth creation over the next decade
summary: As markets become more volatile and leadership shifts across asset classes, investors may need to rethink portfolios built around a single source of returns.

title: Bank of America Q2 net income rises on higher trading activities
summary: Bank of America reported a boost in its second-quarter net income, largely driven by a significant uptick in its trading activities. This surge in trading revenue helped offset other areas, leading to a stronger overall financial performance for the banking giant during the period.

title: Wells Fargo tops profit estimates on interest income boost, trading boom
summary: Wells Fargo reported a significant profit increase in the second quarter. Strong trading desks and robust loan growth fueled this positive financial performance. Net income rose seventeen percent, exceeding analyst expectations for the period. The bank's investment banking fees also saw a substantial jump. Headcount reduction continued as part of a long-term growth strategy.

title: Vedanta AGM: Anil Agarwal maps aggressive expansion after demerger, targets scale-up across metals, oil and power
summary: Vedanta plans major expansion across its demerged businesses, targeting higher production in metals, oil, gas, steel and power. Chairman Anil Agarwal highlighted record FY2026 performance, AI-led efficiency, critical mineral exploration and ambitious capacity additions to drive long-term growth.

title: Market wrap: Top gainers and losers on Nifty and Sensex today
summary: Indian benchmark indices ended sharply lower on Tuesday as escalating Middle East tensions and surging crude oil prices triggered broad-based selling. Sensex fell 561 points and Nifty slipped below 24,100, with auto, IT, PSU banks and realty leading losses, while pharma stocks outperformed amid a flight to defensive sectors.

title: IBM shares plunge 22% in pre-market after Q2 earnings forecast falls short of estimates
summary: IBM shares dropped 22% to $228 in pre-market trading after announcing second-quarter sales of $17.2 billion, below estimates of $17.9 billion. CEO Arvind Krishna attributed the decline to customers delaying spending amid shifting priorities in infrastructure and software.

title: SBI Funds Management IPO subscribed 0.71x on Day 1; NII portion leads demand, GMP signals 16% listing premium
summary: SBI Funds Management's IPO saw strong investor interest on Day 1, with overall subscription at 0.71 times. Retail and NII segments showed positive engagement, while QIB interest was lower. The IPO, valued at  ₹9,812.91 crore, is an Offer for Sale with SBI and Amundi as main shareholders.

title: US stock market today: S&P, Dow futures steady as investors await inflation data; crude at one-month high
summary: US stock futures traded mixed as energy prices surged, raising expectations of a Federal Reserve rate hike. Amid heightened Middle East tensions following US strikes on Iran and a cargo fee, investors await key earnings reports and inflation data.

title: Warren Buffett removes Gates Foundation from charity list amid Epstein Files controversy
summary: Warren Buffett did not include the Gates Foundation in his annual charitable stock donations, instead choosing to direct this year's gifts to four family-related foundations, according to CNBC.

title: Volkswagen Layoff: Auto giant may cut 100,000 jobs despite CEO's 'smarter solutions' promise
summary: Volkswagen is considering an additional 50,000 job cuts on top of the existing 50,000 already planned, as part of a major restructuring amid rising pressures from US tariffs, competition in China, and profitability concerns in electric vehicles.

title: Bengaluru landowner sold 17 flats, made  ₹11.8 crore and paid no tax — then won the tax dispute | Know how
summary: A Bengaluru resident won a tax dispute over capital gains of  ₹11.8 crore from selling 17 apartments. Although the income tax department initially rejected his tax exemption claims, the ITAT ruled he could claim exemptions on multiple properties, as each sale was an independent transaction.

title: India's CPI inflation is 4.38%, but your personal inflation could be higher. Here's how to calculate it
summary: India's CPI inflation stood at 4.38% in June 2026, but your personal inflation rate may differ depending on your spending habits. Using MoSPI's category-wise inflation data, you can calculate your own personal inflation rate.

title: Warsh promises inflation will be a 'thing of the past,' cites benefits of AI investment boom
summary: Warsh pledged Tuesday to "get monetary policy right" and defeat the inflation that has bedeviled the central bank for the past five years.

title: Warren Buffett excludes Gates Foundation from his annual donations of Berkshire stock
summary: Warren Buffett omitted the Gates Foundation from his annual charitable stock gifts.
